Catalog/Diagnostics
📦

TREDRO

TREDRO HIV 1-2 Ab 3 Dot Rapid Test

Flow-Through Rapid Diagnostic Test for Detection of HIV-1 and HIV-2 Antibodies

DiagnosticsREF: HVDRPD-01

TREDRO HIV 1-2 Ab 3 Dot Rapid Test Device offers enhanced early detection of HIV-1 and HIV-2 antibodies using advanced flow-through technology with synthetic and recombinant antigens. This diagnostic rapid test delivers accurate results in 3-5 minutes with built-in procedural controls and no hook effect interference. Designed for hospital laboratories and clinical settings, it provides reliable HIV screening with superior sensitivity for early infection detection.

Technical Specifications

test format3 Dot Rapid Test
technologyFlow Through
detection time3-5 minutes
sensitivityEnhanced early infection detection
antigensSynthetic and recombinant antigens of HIV-1 and HIV-2
hook effectNo
procedural controlIn-built
ManufacturerMeril Life Sciences
MaterialSynthetic and recombinant antigens
